title: Lakeland Tough Scrub Washing Up Brush – Scraper For Baked-On Foods Non-Stick Friendly
features: Washing up brush with extra scrubbing power
description: For an extra bit of oomph when it comes to doing the washing up, what you need is a Tough Scrub Brush on duty at the kitchen sink. Tackling all the normal dish-washing duties like plates, cups and cutlery with ease, our tough scrubber really comes into its own for those extra-tough jobs like getting rid of baked-on food and grime – think mucky tins that have been left to cool for several hours after the Sunday roast or the encrusted frying pan from last night that you just couldn’t face at the time! The clever dome-shaped head of this hard-working dish brush lets you get right into the corners of roasting pans to give them a thorough clean, while the bristles themselves are made from nylon so they’re durable and hard-wearing and will hold their shape for longer, even under scalding hot temperatures. However, the bristles are still sufficiently gentle to take care of all your non-stick surfaces. Tough Scrub even has a handy scraping tool right at the tip of the head to get right down and dirty and target stubborn spots with ease, and it’s really easy to put some welly into it because the brush’s handle has a nice soft grip and is ergonomically shaped at a slightly unusual but rather helpful angle, so you can get a good hold on proceedings. The brush also has a hole at the top of the handle so you could hang it up in the cupboard under the sink or next to the sink so it’ll dry easily and be ready for the next time it’s needing to be pressed into action. 16cm L.
